The '''Charon Death Cult''', also known as the '''Cult of Death''', was the primary religious body formed by the [[Charon/Legends|Charon]] [[Species/Legends|species]] during their time in their home dimension of [[otherspace]]. The [[Charon homeworld]] was located near a huge [[Black hole/Legends|black hole]] which influenced the arachnoid species into believing that the inevitable goal of life was [[Death/Legends|death]]. Led by the [[Prophet of the Void]], the Charon preached that all life was to return to the "Void of Death," which took rapid control of Charon society during the early years of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].
